insight: The runner fix closed the iter193 gap: 16/16 candidates executed project-correct via official eval_scripts and vendored SWE-bench parsers, and all 16 are certified-resolved. But the uncurated-test oracle is structurally exhausted: for django, curated PASS_TO_PASS is the whole test module (0 uncurated); where uncurated tests exist (matplotlib up to 168, 193 total), the variant passes all identically to gold. No shipped test distinguishes any certified variant from gold. Reference-free verification of a certified patch cannot rely on the project's own tests; it must synthesize probes beyond them.
next_action: run iter195_synthesized_input_differential_oracle: for certified-resolved candidates, synthesize inputs to the changed callable and execute gold vs variant differentially in-container to witness wrongness no shipped test covers, before re-testing the >=5 accepted-row bar
